opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is cracking and burning everywhere and I'm so wiped out I can't even sit up in bed. My partner's had to help me with everything. The patches have spread really fast over the last couple of days and some of them are splitting open and bleeding.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's blown up over the last 48 hours and I ran out of my skin cream a few days ago — the cracking and the exhaustion got so bad tonight I couldn't cope.

symptom_narrative.onset: started getting much worse about two days ago
symptom_narrative.character: thick scaly patches that are tight, burning, and cracking open
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — I can't stand or get dressed, it hurts to move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across my chest and back, and on my elbows and knees
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — moisturiser used to help but I've run out of my proper cream
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, stretching, clothing rubbing on it, and when the room gets warm it itches more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a crushing, full-body tiredness like the battery has completely drained, and the skin feels tight all over
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this skin condition for years and it flares now and then, but never this badly
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, can't get dressed or wash properly, relying on my partner for everything tonight

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: psoriasis — I've had it for years
past_medical_history.how_managed: strong steroid creams from the pharmacy and moisturiser

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: strong steroid cream for my skin

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: been under a lot of stress recently, which is when it started getting worse

objective_data_offered.value: 37.4 C on our home thermometer this evening
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: thick red scaly patches over the chest, back, elbows and knees; several patches are split open and bleeding; the bedsheets have pinkish weepy staining
no small pus-filled blisters or crops of little bumps that we can see — it's just the cracked scaly patches
